description_long: This is a modern, two-story police station building with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The facade features a combination of dark and beige exterior walls, large horizontal windows, and a main entrance with a covered awning. The property includes a paved driveway and parking area, with a white van parked in front and several trees and landscaped elements around the perimeter. The roof appears to have skylights or solar panels, and the building is surrounded by concrete walkways. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on accessibility and visibility.
description: A modern, two-story police station with dark and beige walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a paved parking area with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a white van parked in front, and landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beige wall, minimal windows, and a tree on the left side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows, the flat roof, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark facade, a secondary entrance, and a vehicle parked on the right.
attribute_building_facade_features: Large horizontal windows, flat roof, main entrance with awning, paved driveway, minimal decorative elements, landscaped trees.
